story_title: 場地白模產生器 (階段一)
current_task: [FRONTEND] 物件系統:牆壁線段工具(固定厚度、端點拖拉)與柱子矩形工具(拖曳擺放),含選取/移動/刪除
notes: Playwright formal acceptance gate (Task 2) complete: fresh full run against a live local dev server (npm run dev, Next.js 16.2.10 Turbopack, ready in 555ms) — npx playwright test playwright-tests/venue-plan-editor.spec.ts playwright-tests/venue-objects.spec.ts -> 26/26 passed (32.2s), not just a re-trust of QA's last run. Cross-checked test coverage against all 13 acceptance criteria in orchestrator-output.md individually (default mode, wall draw+snap+auto-select, sub-snap-unit no-op, column place+snap+clamp+auto-select, select/highlight, deselect-on-empty-click, body drag translate+snap+bounds, endpoint drag independent, endpoint-coincidence reject+revert, Delete/Backspace removal, 刪除 button + no-op-when-empty, multi-object independence, bounds clamping) — every criterion maps to a currently-passing test, confirming intent coverage not just mechanical pass. Both QA regression tests (bug 1: stale-selection hijack on mode re-entry; bug 2: trailing-click reselects old object) also passed. No failures, nothing routed back to implement. checkpoints.playwright=completed, stage=complete. This is Task 2 of 5 in the 場地白模產生器 story — story itself is not complete, only this task.
